title: galliaria patula
intro: Galliaria patula, also known as Russian tansy or golden ragwort, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Galliaria patula include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
